use_cases: Show reading progress on long-form articles or documentation pages
Display scroll position in single-page applications and dashboards
Indicate content loading or scroll depth in media applications
Provide visual feedback for scrollable content containers
Track user engagement through scroll progress in analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A scroll progress indicator component that displays a fixed top progress bar tracking page or container scroll position in real-time. Built with Framer Motion's useSpring for smooth, physics-based animations and useScroll for scroll tracking. Wraps content in a scrollable container while maintaining a persistent progress bar. Ideal for documentation sites, article readers, and long-form content platforms.
